title: Viprasol VP - SCE
author: viprasol
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: Viprasol VP - SCE by viprasol.
## Overview The Sniper Confluence Entry/Exit indicator is a precision trade-entry system that combines EMA crossover signals with a 7-factor confluence scoring engine.
Unlike basic crossover indicators, this tool only fires signals when multiple technical factors align, dramatically reducing false entries.
Built for swing and intraday traders who want clean, high-probability setups with automatic stop-loss and take-profit management.
